---
title: "Events"
---

Events and conferences with presentations related to JDemetra+

- OECD/ Insee annual TSA workshop in December

- NTTS conference, organized by Eurostat in Brussels, next in March 2027

- uRos conference in November, next 18,19,20 Nov in Paris

- ISI conference, World Statistical Congress (WSC0), next in Lusaka 11-15 July 2027
